name: HelpViewer
summary: Class for viewing help files with Tekla Structures HelpViewer.exe.

methods.name: DisplayHelpTopic
methods.summary: Method for opening Tekla Structures help viewer with given help topic. Method requires Tekla Structures to be running.

methods.name: DisplayHelpTopicIndependent
methods.summary: Method for opening Tekla Structures help viewer independently from given file path with given help topic and language.
